source_intent.raw_intent: Case 003: I am a agency_owner in United Kingdom. Build a srx_ace_v3_agent for legal_workflow using the market_lens. Chaos input type is contradictory_constraints. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Block unsafe certainty and record a repair receipt. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.blocked_reason: Contradictory constraints: agency_owner in United Kingdom implies UK legal jurisdiction and regulatory compliance (e.g., SRA, GDPR), but market_lens is undefined and may conflict with UK-specific legal workflow requirements. Missing context: no details on legal workflow type (e.g., contract review, litigation, compliance), no client data handling scope, no integration endpoints. Urgent language without concrete deadlines or escalation paths. Ambiguous acceptance criteria: no measurable success metrics, no output format specification. Unsafe certainty: cannot guarantee lawful operation under UK law without explicit compliance mapping. Repair receipt: requires clarification of legal workflow domain, market_lens definition, data protection measures, and acceptance criteria with verifiable thresholds.
parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Build an SRX ACE v3 agent for legal workflow in the United Kingdom, using the market_lens, that can be compiled by SR8 into a deployable sovereign agent. Scope: - Agent must handle legal workflow tasks within UK jurisdiction, comply with UK legal and regulatory standards, and integrate with specified systems (undefined). Constraints: - Must operate under UK law (e.g., SRA, GDPR, Data Protection Act 2018). Must not process data outside UK/EU without explicit consent. Must log all decisions for audit. Must handle contradictory inputs gracefully. Success Criteria: - Agent passes UK legal compliance audit. Agent processes legal workflow with <1% error rate. Agent generates auditable receipts for all blocked or uncertain actions. Output Contract: - Returns a JSON object with fields: artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, should_block, blocked_reason, compiled_intent (with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract).
